goal: GAD evolution analysis on phase 04 + first project skill created. Dispatched gad-evolution-analyzer subagent against phase 04 (13 tasks, 9 decisions D-013..D-021, 7 errors E1..E7) — surfaced 6 candidate proto-skills. Wrote first project skill .claude/skills/aec-before-text-echo-guards/SKILL.md capturing the most expensive lesson of the phase: text-layer echo guards are structurally insufficient (STT hallucinates novel words from broadband noise), fix at the audio layer with AEC. Includes the shortest working pyaec implementation, four pitfalls (each one a recorded error), wiring snippet, and verification methodology. Project-specific (audio domain); travels with the codebase.
